142.reason: This line incorrectly increments i even when the next character is not part of the operator, causing the next character to be skipped.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  This line incorrectly increments i even when the next character is not part of the operator, causing the next character to be skipped.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  After processing a single '|', this i++ incorrectly skips the next character in the input, causing loss of tokens or misalignment.

151.reason: Same issue: i++ should only occur inside the else branch for the double-character case.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Same issue: i++ should only occur inside the else branch for the double-character case.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Same issue: unconditionally skipping the following character after a single '&' leads to missing input characters.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect token type: CharConst should use CHRCON, not STRCON; also fails to validate proper char literal format and may read beyond input bounds]
